newsSince: Material positive: Teradyne secured its first multisystem PRODUCTION test orders for merchant GPUs (new datapoint) and continues HBM4/DRAM and TSMC traction; AI is ~70% of Q1 revenue. The Tokyo Electron KGD chiplet test-cell collaboration was formalized, and Nasdaq-100 inclusion (effective Jun 22) drove a +7% Jun 20 pop (technical/passive flow, not fundamental).

sources.label: Teradyne TER +7.19% on Jun 20 / Nasdaq-100 inclusion (TradingKey)
TER rides strong semiconductor test segment (Yahoo Finance)

verdicts.rankRationale: AI-node test-intensity lens: first multisystem PRODUCTION test orders for merchant GPUs plus HBM4/TSMC traction are genuine new fundamental evidence (vs prior product-announcement-only). I exclude the Nasdaq-100/passive flow from scoring. +104% YTD caps upside. Modest up.
verdicts.bull: First production GPU multisystem test wins, HBM4/DRAM and TSMC traction; AI ~70% of revenue makes TER a rising test-intensity chokepoint.
verdicts.neutral: Levered to AI fab/HBM capacity additions, but upside hinges on order timing and export-control risk.
verdicts.bear: +104% YTD, insider selling and Q2 guided sequentially lower; much of the move is Nasdaq-100 passive flow, not durable alpha.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Production GPU/HBM4 test-order ramp and SoC test intensity

verdicts.rankRationale: Co-packaged-optics lens: TER's CPO link is indirect; the new GPU-production-test and Tokyo Electron KGD wins strengthen test demand but not the optical interconnect angle (Photon 100 silicon-photonics tester is the only direct CPO tie). Tiny positive; +104% YTD leaves thin residual alpha. Near-hold.
verdicts.bull: Photon 100 silicon-photonics tester gives a real CPO-adjacent foothold as co-packaged optics scale into test.
verdicts.neutral: AI/advanced-packaging test demand with only an indirect CPO link; the new wins are chiplet KGD, not optics.
verdicts.bear: +104% YTD and $66B cap leave thin residual alpha on a crowding-sensitive CPO list; CPO exposure stays indirect.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Customer concentration and indirect CPO linkage

verdicts.rankRationale: Master bottleneck list, EDA/test/timing bucket: first production GPU multisystem test orders and HBM4/TSMC traction are genuine new design-validation evidence since June 9, beyond the prior KGD product news. Exclude Nasdaq-100 passive flow. +104% YTD limits room but thesis strengthens. Modest up.
verdicts.bull: Production GPU and HBM test wins confirm rising AI-chip verification intensity; TER is a scarce test-and-probe chokepoint.
verdicts.neutral: Design-validation exposure with strong YTD follow-through; watch test and robotics execution and pricing.
verdicts.bear: Insider sales, sequentially lower Q2 guide and +104% YTD mean much upside is priced; passive-flow froth from index inclusion.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Order timing, robotics-segment drag and valuation
